name: @prismical/mic-detector
description: Dedicated macOS native microphone activity detector for Prismical meeting notifications

scripts.build: swift build --configuration release && mkdir -p bin && cp .build/release/prismical-mic-detector bin/prismical-mic-detector && codesign --force --sign - bin/prismical-mic-detector
scripts.dev: swift build --configuration debug && mkdir -p bin && cp .build/debug/prismical-mic-detector bin/prismical-mic-detector && codesign --force --sign - bin/prismical-mic-detector
